title: Acidanthera amoena
taxonomy: Acidanthera amoena is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. This plant is native to South Africa and is known for its vibrant, funnel-shaped flowers. Acidanthera amoena is often classified as a member of the genus Gladiolus by some sources. However, it is generally accepted as a member of the genus Acidanthera due to its unique characteristics. The classification of Acidanthera amoena may vary depending on the source, but it is widely recognized as a distinct species within the Iridaceae family.
